message:
feat(tui): Add interactive parameter tweaking to SimulationView

Enable real-time parameter adjustment during simulation runs:

New key bindings:
- [ and ] keys: Navigate between parameters (selectedParam state)
- + and - keys: Increase/decrease selected numeric parameter
- Parameters respect min/max bounds and step size from metadata

UI changes:
- Parameters section shows "[/] to select, +/- to tweak" hint
- Selected parameter highlighted with ▶ prefix and green color
- Each parameter shows its valid range and step size
- "No adjustable parameters" message for simulations without params

Controls section updated:
- Added "[/] param select · +/- param tweak" to control hints

Implementation details:
- Track selectedParam index via useState
- Read parameter metadata from simulation.parameters
- Clamp adjusted values to [min, max] range
- Update both latestStateRef and store via updateState()
- Works with any numeric parameter (number type check)

This transforms simulations from "watch and reset" to "adjust and observe":
- Change burst size mid-plaque to see immediate effect
- Adjust latent period to understand lysis timing
- Tweak lysogeny probability to shift plaque morphology
- Interactive experimentation without restart

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
